product_overview: UpNext is a real-time collaborative music queue where an authenticated host creates and controls a live room and anonymous participants join via a 6-character code or invite URL to add songs and vote. The host plays audio via an embedded YouTube player and manages session lifecycle from the host session view.
core_goals: Allow a host to sign up, log in, create a live session, and control playback for attendees.
Allow anonymous participants to join a session via a 6-character code or invite URL, set a display name, add tracks, and vote on queue ordering.
Make sessions shareable via an invite link and simple copy workflow so participants can join quickly.
Provide clear session lifecycle states: live session, expired/ended session recap, and host-only controls in the host session view.

features.name: Host Signup
features.description: Create a host account by providing a display name, email, and password; successful signup yields an authenticated host dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /host/auth -> Select Sign up tab -> Fill display name -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit create account -> See authenticated dashboard with 'Welcome, {displayName}.'
Navigate to /host/auth -> Select Sign up tab -> Fill display name -> Fill email (already in use) -> Fill password -> Submit create account -> See error toast about duplicate email

features.name: Host Login
features.description: Existing hosts authenticate with email and password to access the host dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /host/auth -> Ensure Login tab is active -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See authenticated dashboard with 'Welcome, {displayName}.'
Navigate to /host/auth -> Ensure Login tab is active -> Fill email -> Fill password (invalid) -> Submit login form -> See error toast 'Invalid email or password.'

features.name: Host Dashboard (authenticated)
features.description: Authenticated host landing that shows a primary action to create a session and a list of previous sessions with Live/Ended badges.
user_flows: Navigate to /host/auth (authenticated) -> Click Host a session -> See Host a session button label change to Creating... -> See redirect to host session view URL containing join code -> See join code displayed and empty queue

Navigate to /host/auth (authenticated) -> View Previous sessions list with Live/Ended badges and participant counts -> Click Open dashboard for a session row -> See host session view for that session with join code displayed
Navigate to /host/auth (authenticated) -> Click Logout -> See auth gate at /host/auth (unauthenticated)

features.name: Join Room Modal (Landing Page)
features.description: Landing-page modal where a participant can enter a 6-character join code or paste a full invite URL; the input is pre-validated before navigation.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open Join Room modal -> Type a valid 6-character room code -> Click Continue -> Continue button shows Checking... while validating -> Modal closes -> See participant pre-join screen for that session code

Navigate to / -> Open Join Room modal -> Paste a valid invite URL containing /session/{CODE}/join or ?code={CODE} -> Click Continue -> Continue button shows Checking... while validating -> Modal closes -> See participant pre-join screen for that session code
Navigate to / -> Open Join Room modal -> Type invalid text that cannot be parsed to a 6-char code -> Click Continue -> See inline error 'Please enter a valid URL.'
Navigate to / -> Open Join Room modal -> Type a valid 6-character code that does not exist -> Click Continue -> See inline error 'Session not found for code {CODE}'
Navigate to / -> Open Join Room modal -> Close modal (Cancel or X) -> Modal closes and landing page remains visible

features.name: Participant Pre-Join Screen
features.description: Pre-join flow where a guest verifies session info, supplies a display name, and enters the live session; guest identity is persisted locally.
user_flows: Arrive at pre-join screen for a session code (via join modal or invite) -> See session info card with room code and host name -> Fill display name -> Click Enter the Gallery -> Enter button shows Checking room... while lookup pending -> See participant live session view loaded -> See display name and guest UUID stored in localStorage
Arrive at pre-join screen for a session code -> GET session lookup fails -> See 'Session not found for code {CODE}' message

features.name: Participant Live Session View
features.description: Participant-facing live room where guests can view Now Playing, add tracks (search / YouTube / Spotify), vote, edit display name, see history and people, and share the invite link.
user_flows: Arrive at participant live session view (joined) -> See Now Playing panel with progress information -> Type a search query in Add to Queue input -> Navigate suggestions with ArrowDown/ArrowUp and select with Enter -> Add track -> See added track appear in the queue
Arrive at participant live session view (joined) -> Type a valid YouTube URL in Add to Queue input -> Add track -> See added track appear in the queue
Arrive at participant live session view (joined) -> Click upvote on a queue item -> See vote count increment and upvote toggled to filled state
Arrive at participant live session view (joined) -> Open edit display name dialog -> Replace name with a non-empty name -> Save -> See updated name in header and People tab
Arrive at participant live session view (joined) -> Open edit display name dialog -> Replace name with whitespace-only value -> Save -> See error toast rejecting empty name

Arrive at participant live session view (joined) -> Open Invite Friends modal -> Click Copy Link -> Copy Link button becomes Copied -> See copy confirmation (allow retry window due to clipboard flakiness) -> Close modal

features.name: Host Live Session View
features.description: Host-only live room where the owner controls playback, sees a live feed, manages session settings (create new / stop), and accesses an ended-session recap inline after stopping.
user_flows: Navigate to host session view as authenticated host -> See now playing card, live feed, queue and floating playback dock -> Observe playback controls disabled and YouTube iframe not mounted when no currentVideoId is present

Navigate to host session view as authenticated host -> Open Settings from sidebar -> Click Create new session -> Create new session button shows Creating... -> See redirect to new host session view URL containing new join code

Navigate to host session view as authenticated host -> Open Settings from sidebar -> Click Stop Session -> Stop Session button shows Stopping... -> Settings modal closes -> See inline EndedHostSessionRecap with 'Session Ended' heading and lists of participants and songs -> Observe Stop Session control is no longer available
Navigate to host session view as authenticated host -> Click Invite your crowd Copy Link -> Copy Link button becomes Copied -> See copy confirmation (allow retry window due to clipboard flakiness)

tech_stack.other: React Query (TanStack), React 19, WebSocket (native), YouTube IFrame API

routes.description: Landing page with marketing content and Join Room modal
Host authentication gate (login/signup) and authenticated dashboard
Participant pre-join screen where guest enters display name
Participant live session view with queue, voting, history, people tabs
Host live session view with playback controls, settings modal, and ended recap

features.name: Host Signup
features.description: New host creates an account with display name, email, and password
user_interactions: Click Sign up tab
Fill display name input
Fill email input
Fill password input
Click Create account button
See error toast on duplicate email (EmailAlreadyInUse)

features.name: Host Login
features.description: Existing host logs in with email and password
user_interactions: Fill email input
Fill password input
Click Login button
See error toast on invalid credentials (InvalidCredentials)

features.name: Host Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated host dashboard showing previous sessions and create session button
user_interactions: Click Host a session button (label changes to Creating... while pending)
View previous sessions list with Live/Ended badges
Click Open dashboard or View room for a session row
Click Logout button to clear JWT and return to auth gate

features.name: Join Room Modal (Landing Page)
features.description: Modal on landing page allowing participant to join via 6-char code or invite URL
user_interactions: Click Join Link button in hero section to open modal
Type 6-character room code or paste full invite URL
Click Continue button (label becomes Checking... while validating)
See inline error Please enter a valid URL. for invalid format
See inline error Session not found for code {CODE} for valid but non-existent session
Click Cancel or X to close modal

features.name: Participant Pre-Join Screen
features.description: Guest enters display name before joining live session
user_interactions: View session info card with room code and host name
Fill display name input
Click Enter the Gallery button (label is Checking room... while session lookup pending)
See Session not found for code {CODE} if session lookup fails

features.name: Participant Live Session View
features.description: Guest participant view with queue, voting, history, people, and invite functionality
user_interactions: View Now Playing panel with progress bar
Type search query or YouTube/Spotify URL in Add to Queue input
Select search suggestion via keyboard (ArrowUp/ArrowDown/Enter) or click
Click Add Track to add song
Click upvote button on queue items (toggles filled state)
Click pencil icon to edit display name; save or cancel
Click Invite Friends button to open invite modal
Click X to close invite modal
View People tab with Host badge on host participant
View History tab with Previously Played list
See Host ended this session screen with Go Home and Create Your Own Session CTAs when session expires

features.name: Host Live Session View
features.description: Host controls playback, views queue and live feed, manages session via settings modal
user_interactions: View now playing card, live feed, queue list
Click play/pause and skip next in floating playback dock
Click Invite your crowd Copy Link button
Open Settings sidebar item to show Host Settings modal
Click Create new session in settings modal (label becomes Creating...)
Click Stop Session in settings modal (label becomes Stopping...)
View EndedHostSessionRecap with Session Ended heading after stop
View recap participant list and songs played list

known_limitations.issue: YouTube iframe player mounts only when currentVideoId is set; freshly created empty session has no player
known_limitations.impact: Playback controls are disabled until first song is active; do not assert player presence immediately after session creation

known_limitations.issue: Features, How It Works top-nav buttons and View Demo CTA button are marketing placeholders with no navigation
known_limitations.impact: Do not assert navigation on these buttons

known_limitations.issue: Guest identity stored in localStorage only; no authenticated participant accounts
known_limitations.impact: Guest state does not persist across browsers or incognito sessions

known_limitations.issue: Clipboard API may be flaky in headless Chromium
known_limitations.impact: Copy Link -> Copied assertion may need retry window

known_limitations.issue: Transient WebSocket connection errors are delayed ~1.2s and suppressed on reconnect
known_limitations.impact: Do not assert immediate connection-error toast on first blip

known_limitations.issue: Host auth feedback is toast-only; no inline field-level error banners
known_limitations.impact: Assert toast body text, not inline form errors
